en.extract:
The brown-capped laughingthrush (Trochalopteron austeni) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is found in the Patkai range, where its natural habitat is subtropical and tropical moist montane forests.

The '''brown-capped laughingthrush''' ('''''Trochalopteron austeni''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Leiothrichidae]]. It is found in the [[Patkai]] range, where its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical and tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.<ref name = "BirdLife"/>

zh.extract:
褐顶噪鹛（学名：Garrulax austeni），是画眉科噪鹛属的一种，分布于印度和缅甸。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
褐顶噪鹛的平均体重约为63.8克。栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。


参考文献
Garrulax austeni. BirdLife.org.   [2011-06-27]. （原始内容存档于2016-03-04）.
